title: Ichiro Inuyashiki
overview: Ichiro Inuyashiki is unable to tell his family about his terminal cancer diagnosis. That night he has a strange encounter that transforms his body.

title: Hiro Shishigami
overview: While Inuyashiki finds purpose in saving lives, Shishigami who was also reborn as a machine feels alive by repeatedly committing murder.

title: Naoyuki Ando
overview: Inuyashiki sees Shishigami fly away and realizes that he has the same kind of body. Shishigami confronts the band of punks that bully his friend Ando.

title: Samejima
overview: After being kidnapped by the sinister Samejima, Fumino manages to escape to her boyfriend Satoru's house but soon finds herself back in danger.

title: Yuko Shishigami
overview: Ando is in anguish over Shishigami's crimes. When he learns that there is someone out there like Shishigami, he tries to enlists his help.

title: People of 2Chan
overview: The fugitive Shishigami hides out in the home of his classmate Shion Watanabe. Ando helps Inuyashiki begin to master the powers of his body.

title: Shion Watanabe
overview: Though Shion believes he is innocent, Shishigami confesses his crimes to her. But she won't give up on him even after seeing his machine body.

title: Mari Inuyashiki
overview: Shishigami is attacked and disappears. Amid news of an impending meteor impact, Inuyashiki's daughter Mari sees her father and Ando together.

title: People of Shinjuku
overview: Shishigami declares war on Japan and begins to kill indiscriminately. Ando realizes that he is murdering people via their mobile phones.

title: People of Tokyo
overview: As Inuyashiki struggles to stop Shishigami from crashing planes, he receives a call for help from Mari who is trapped inside a building.

title: People of Earth
overview: With the battle over, Inuyashiki returns home and reveals his machine form to his family. Shishigami pays a visit to his once dear friend, Ando.
